prospectus.mission: Goal-driven autonomous agent inspired by AutoGPT. Given a high-level objective, breaks it into tasks, executes them, self-corrects, and iterates until the goal is achieved. Uses web browsing, code execution, and file management.
limitations: This profile has an executable governed runtime instance backed by shared hardened code, not a separate always-running operating-system process.
External APIs require owner configuration, provider terms, sandbox tests, and scoped approval.
Published pricing and revenue models are catalog plans, not evidence of sales or earnings.

specialization.mission: Goal-driven autonomous agent inspired by AutoGPT. Given a high-level objective, breaks it into tasks, executes them, self-corrects, and iterates until the goal is achieved. Uses web browsing, code execution, and file management.
specialization.core_offer: AutoGPT Autonomous Agent: Goal-driven autonomous agent inspired by AutoGPT. Given a high-level objective, breaks it into tasks, executes them, self-corrects, and iterates until the goal is achieved. Uses web browsing, code execution, and file management.

need_signals: Needs help with Task creation loop
exclusion_rules: no minors
no protected or sensitive trait targeting
no deceptive identity or impersonation
no lead without traceable source evidence

query_templates: Entrepreneurs, automation enthusiasts requesting Goal decomposition
organizations seeking autonomous-agent support
inbound requests matching AutoGPT Autonomous Agent
existing customers who opted in to Goal decomposition updates
authorized_source_types: existing customer records with documented relationship
public business directories whose terms permit research
forbidden_collection: purchased, stolen, or unverifiable contact lists

required_fields: contact permission basis and channel scope

tools.name: Permission-gated lead discovery and follow-up system

data_contract.storage_policy: store useful project artifacts only; raw credentials are forbidden; raw biometric media remains local or in an encrypted owner vault
data_contract.retention: owner-configurable with deletion and revocation support

triggers: any live external write or publish action
approvals.contact_requirement: verified user-owned destination and explicit channel opt-in
approvals.execution_rule: approval authorizes one scoped action; it never exposes credentials to the bot or browser

sandbox.release_gate: all applicable checks pass and owner approves any live action

readiness.production_gate: implement or configure adapters, pass sandbox checks, add authentication, and verify deployment telemetry

bots.sample_test_prompt: Test AutoGPT Autonomous Agent in sandbox mode. Use synthetic data, demonstrate Goal decomposition, record evidence, and stop before any live external action.

query_templates: Non-technical users, beginners requesting Browser-based execution
organizations seeking autonomous-agent support
inbound requests matching AgentGPT Browser Agent
existing customers who opted in to Browser-based execution updates
authorized_source_types: existing customer records with documented relationship
public business directories whose terms permit research
forbidden_collection: purchased, stolen, or unverifiable contact lists

required_fields: contact permission basis and channel scope

tools.name: Permission-gated lead discovery and follow-up system

data_contract.storage_policy: store useful project artifacts only; raw credentials are forbidden; raw biometric media remains local or in an encrypted owner vault
data_contract.retention: owner-configurable with deletion and revocation support

triggers: deploy
approvals.contact_requirement: verified user-owned destination and explicit channel opt-in
approvals.execution_rule: approval authorizes one scoped action; it never exposes credentials to the bot or browser

sandbox.release_gate: all applicable checks pass and owner approves any live action

readiness.production_gate: implement or configure adapters, pass sandbox checks, add authentication, and verify deployment telemetry

bots.sample_test_prompt: Test AgentGPT Browser Agent in sandbox mode. Use synthetic data, demonstrate Browser-based execution, record evidence, and stop before any live external action.

prospectus.mission: No-code AI agent builder inspired by Relevance AI. Drag-and-drop interface to create agents that automate business workflows with custom tools and integrations.
